revisions.summary:
Built from the request: *"produce a map of all the inter-state freeways in California."*

**Approach** — composed entirely in FFL over the pinned `osm-geocoder` library, with no new workflow code:

1. `CacheRegion("California")` — download + cache the California OSM extract.
2. `osm.Source.PBF.ExtractRoads(road_class="motorway")` — extract all freeway (motorway) segments as GeoJSON, preserving OSM tags including `ref`.
3. `osm.Filters.FilterGeoJSONByTagPrefix(tag_key="ref", value_prefix="I ")` — keep only Interstate-numbered routes (I 5, I 80, …), dropping non-Interstate freeways (US 101, CA 99).
4. `osm.viz.RenderMap` — render a MapLibre HTML map.

**Why the ref-prefix filter** — "inter-state freeways" means the US Interstate Highway System specifically. In OSM those are `highway=motorway` whose `ref` begins with "I "; California motorways also include state/US freeways, so a plain motorway extract over-includes. The existing `FilterByOSMTag` only matches a tag value exactly, so a new prefix filter (`FilterGeoJSONByTagPrefix`) was added to select the Interstate family.

**Verified run** — 69,362 California motorway segments → 16,594 Interstate segments → rendered HTML map.
